definition:
1. to get by barter  or traffic, earn , (Sophocles Tragicus):—;Mid., βίοτον πολὺν ἐμπολόωντο they were getting  much substance by traffic , (Odyssey by Homer) 
2. to deal  or traffic in  a thing, to purchase, buy , (Sophocles Tragicus):—;metaphorically, ἐμπ. τὴν ἐμὴν φρένα to make profit of  my mind, by dealing  with me, (Odyssey by Homer) 
3. absolute to deal as a merchant, traffic , (Aristophanes Comicus):—;metaphorically, ἠμποληκὼς τὰ πλεῖστ᾽ ἀμείνονα having dealt in  most things with success, (Aeschulus Tragicus) (ML)
